resources.string: Un punto de entrada diario local aparecera aqui en una fase posterior.
Un espacio privado de reflexion aparecera aqui en una fase posterior.
Las herramientas guiadas de crecimiento apareceran aqui en una fase posterior.
Los recursos de apoyo guardados apareceran aqui en una fase posterior.
Ajusta las bases visuales de la fase 2.
Solo marcador de posicion. No hay cuenta, sincronizacion, IA ni motor de almacenamiento activo.
Noto Sans con fuentes de respaldo por escritura
Atkinson Hyperlegible con fuentes Noto de respaldo
Los paquetes de idioma son bases borrador pendientes de revision antes del uso en produccion.
Personal growth features need local adult confirmation before use.
Adult status is confirmed locally for this session.
Storage remains off until adult access is confirmed.
Persistent narrative storage is off until encrypted storage is available on this device.
Confirm adult access to use the deterministic flow.
The deterministic sequence stays the same without AI, backend or account access.
Confirm adult access before starting personal growth features.
This local flow is complete for now.
Support planning remains user-controlled. Bettamind does not contact anyone automatically.
Name what is happening before choosing a response.
Choose one concrete action you can take.
Consider likely effects without scoring personal worth.
Notice whether repair is needed and what would be respectful.
Carry forward one lesson for the next choice.
Bettamind can require local authentication before private encrypted storage is released. The recommended default is one minute.
Reauthentication is still required before export, sync, professional sharing, recovery data, security changes, PIN changes, deleting local data or highly sensitive records.
A locked screen may offer static urgent-support information without revealing personal data.
Bettamind can support human relationships, dating, consent and loneliness, but it is software, not a romantic or sexual partner.
Romantic, sexual, exclusivity or dependency signals are not eligible for permanent memory by default.
Reminder copy stays neutral and cannot imply Bettamind misses, needs or chooses the user.
